pitch.subject: I built a website for Test Business 5
pitch.body:
Hi there,

I noticed Test Business 5 doesn't have a website yet, so I went ahead and built one for you.

👉 Preview it here: https://test-business-5.prebuilt-sites.com

Here's why this matters:

• 45% average revenue increase for electrical contractors businesses with websites
• 92% of consumers research online first research businesses online before contacting them
• Your competitors are getting the customers who search online

I built this specifically for Test Business 5 - it's already customized with your services, contact info, and optimized for local search.

**Pricing:**
• $250 one-time (website ownership transfers to you)
• First month hosting FREE
• $7/month hosting after that (optional - no maintenance included)

If you like it, claim it here: [PAYMENT_LINK]

If not, no worries - I'll remove it in 7 days.

Questions? Just reply to this email or call me at (555) 123-4567.

Best regards,
John @ NorthStar Synergy

P.S. - 8 other electrical contractors businesses in Seattle, WA already have websites. Don't let them capture all the online customers.
